title: Silky Light Croatian Herbs Stir-fry
description: This light and herbal dish features a blend of fresh red peppers, raw-friendly ingredients for an easy meal perfect as a side or light main course.

ingredients.name: Red bell pepper vinegar (optional)
ingredients.notes: such as balsamic or red wine vinegar

instructions: Preheat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add olive oil and swirl to coat the pan.
Add minced garlic, stir for about 30 seconds until fragrant but not browned.
Slice the red bell pepper into thin strips and add to the pan. Cook until slightly tender but still crisp, about 5 minutes.
Stir in chopped parsley and dill, along with a pinch of salt and black pepper. Season well.
If using red bell pepper vinegar (optional), reduce heat to low and drizzle on top of peppers for a touch of sweetness and tanginess before serving.
Garnish with fresh chopped herbs if desired and serve immediately.
